text: How did Roy stop the thieves?
zh: 罗伊是怎么阻止那些小偷的?

text: Roy Trenton used to drive a taxi.
zh: 罗伊·特伦顿以前开出租车。

text: A short while ago, however,
zh: 然而不久前,

text: he became a bus driver
zh: 他成了一名公交车司机,

text: and he has not regretted it.
zh: 他对此从未后悔过。

text: He is finding his new work far more exciting.
zh: 他觉得新工作更让人兴奋。

text: When he was driving
zh: 最近有一次,他开车

text: along Catford Street recently,
zh: 沿着卡特福德街行驶时,

text: he saw two thieves rush out of a shop
zh: 他看见两个小偷冲出一家商店,

text: and run towards a waiting car.
zh: 朝一辆等着的汽车跑去。

text: One of them was carrying a bag full of money.
zh: 其中一人拎着一个装满钱的包。

text: Roy acted quickly and drove the bus
zh: 罗伊反应很快,把公交车

text: straight at the thieves.
zh: 径直朝那些小偷开去。

text: The one with the money got such a fright
zh: 拿钱的那个人被吓得不轻,

text: that he dropped the bag.
zh: 竟把包给扔了。

text: As the thieves were trying to get away in their car,
zh: 就在小偷们试图开车逃跑时,

text: Roy drove his bus into the back of it.
zh: 罗伊驾着公交车撞上了他们车的后部。

text: While the battered car was moving away,
zh: 那辆受损的车开走的时候,

text: Roy stopped his bus and telephoned the police.
zh: 罗伊停下公交车,报了警。

text: The thieves' car was badly damaged and easy to recognize.
zh: 小偷的车损坏严重,很容易辨认。

text: Shortly afterwards,
zh: 没过多久,

text: the police stopped the car and both men were arrested.
zh: 警方就截住了那辆车,两名男子都被逮捕了。
